Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel. I am calling about the Colombia shipment.
My connection is bad. Hold on, let me move closer. Better now?
Yes, perfect. The supplier sent new dates. I will send them to you now.
Great. On our video call tomorrow, can you share screen with the agenda?
Of course. I will mute the room first, then I will show it to everyone.
Perfect. I have to go now. Call me back if you need anything. Talk soon.

Hi Fernanda, this is Daniel. I am sorry I missed you. I am calling about the Colombia shipment. The supplier sent me the new dates, so I am going to forward them to you this afternoon. Could you call me back before five? My line is free after three. If you cannot reach me, leave me a message and I will call you back. Thank you so much. Talk soon.

Hi Daniel, this is Fernanda. Thank you for your message. I am going to call you back at four. I have the new dates here and I am going to send them to the team. One quick thing about our video call tomorrow: my connection was bad last week, so I am going to test it before we start. If you cannot hear me, please tell me and I will share my screen with the agenda. Talk soon.

First, answer the call and say who you are, like Hello, this is Fernanda. Then, give the reason, like I am calling about the shipment. Next, fix a problem if there is one, like Sorry, you are breaking up, can you hear me? Finally, close the call, like I will call you back, talk soon.
